---
title: ""
---

:::{.hero-section}
# First Synthesis

:::{.lead}
We are First Synthesis LLC. Our primary demonstration, the **Monist Engine**, abandons traditional hierarchical type-checking. By utilizing geometric shortest-path routing, Monist compiles structurally dense paradoxes into native, lock-free Interaction Nets. Built for formal verification and absolute structural certainty.
:::

:::{.action-buttons}
<a href="#" class="btn-primary">View GitHub</a>
<a href="#" class="btn-secondary">Read Whitepaper</a>
:::
:::

## Autonomous GPU Dispatch

*Monist executes highly parallel combinatorial reductions directly in VRAM, completely bypassing CPU synchronization overhead.*

```{=html}
<div class="terminal-window">
  <div class="terminal-header">
    <div class="dots">
      <div class="dot"></div>
      <div class="dot"></div>
      <div class="dot"></div>
    </div>
    <span>bash — monist-core/kosaraju-scc</span>
  </div>
  <div class="terminal-body">
    <div class="terminal-placeholder">
      [ Placeholder: Terminal Visual Logic Operation GIF 1 ]<br><br>
      > Flattening 0-weight semantic cycles...<br>
      > Measuring thermodynamic weights...
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<div class="terminal-window">
  <div class="terminal-header">
    <div class="dots">
      <div class="dot"></div>
      <div class="dot"></div>
      <div class="dot"></div>
    </div>
    <span>bash — monist-comb/reduce.wgsl</span>
  </div>
  <div class="terminal-body">
    <div class="terminal-placeholder">
      [ Placeholder: Terminal Visual Logic Operation GIF 2 ]<br><br>
      > Allocating 32-bit Pointers in GPU Arena...<br>
      > Lock-Free CAS Parallel Graph Rewire Active...
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

## Architecture Features

::::{.feature-grid}

:::{.feature-card}
### The Oracle Layer
Transforms standard first-order logic into algebraic constraint matrices. Monist synthesizes dynamic T-Functors to absorb structural friction during dense recursion.
:::

:::{.feature-card}
### WGPU Physics Backend
32-Bit Tagged Pointers in a native Arena. Continuous evaluation until logical fixpoint via WGSL compute shaders, bypassing 64-bit atomic limits.
:::

:::{.feature-card}
### Formal Verification
Continuously compiles structural topologies into SMT-LIB v2 witnesses directly into Lean 4 for parallel proof-theoretic validation.
:::

::::
